```latex
\exists T_\epsilon < \infty \text{ s.t. } \left\| \bar{\mathbf{X}}^{(t+1)} - \bar{\mathbf{X}}^{(t)} \right\|_2 \leq \epsilon, \forall t \geq T_\epsilon.
```
data.latex:
```latex
\exists T_\epsilon < \infty \text{ s.t. } \left\| \bar{\mathbf{X}}^{(t+1)} - \bar{\mathbf{X}}^{(t)} \right\|_2 \leq \epsilon, \forall t \geq T_\epsilon.
```

data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
&\left\|\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t+1)} - \bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t+1)}\right\|_2 = \\
&= \left\|\sigma\left(\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} + \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V}\right) - \sigma\left(\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} + \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V}\right)\right\|_2 \leq \\
&\leq \left\|\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} + \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V} - \tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} - \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V}\right\|_2 = \\
&= \left\|\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} - \tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\mathbf{W}\right\|_2 \leq \\
&\leq \left\|\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\right\|_2 \left\|\mathbf{W}\right\|_2 \left\|\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)} - \bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\right\|_2.
\end{align*}
```
data.latex:
```latex
\begin{align*}
&\left\|\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t+1)} - \bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t+1)}\right\|_2 = \\
&= \left\|\sigma\left(\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} + \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V}\right) - \sigma\left(\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} + \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V}\right)\right\|_2 \leq \\
&\leq \left\|\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} + \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V} - \tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} - \mathbf{X}\mathbf{V}\right\|_2 = \\
&= \left\|\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)}\mathbf{W} - \tilde{\mathbf{L}}\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\mathbf{W}\right\|_2 \leq \\
&\leq \left\|\tilde{\mathbf{L}}\right\|_2 \left\|\mathbf{W}\right\|_2 \left\|\bar{\mathbf{X}}_{a}^{(t)} - \bar{\mathbf{X}}_{b}^{(t)}\right\|_2.
\end{align*}
```
